cards.back: A duopoly game where firms produce a differentiated product and produce quantities that set the market price
A situation where players in a game have incomplete or uncertain knowledge about the state of the environment or other players' actions
A state where the quantity supplied equals the quantity demanded, resulting in no change in market price or quantity
A type of game where players choose quantities to produce, rather than prices
A type of game where players choose prices to sell their product, rather than quantities
